title: Megumin hat
description: Changes the carved pumpkin to a megumin hat, if renamed on the anvil.
body:
# Megumin hat 
This resource pack will add a megumin hat model. To do this, you will need to rename the carved pumpkin "Megumin hat".

# Dependencies
This pack requires Optifine or CIT Resewn, either can be downloaded below:
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
